'''thachuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaledom|whaledom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaledom|whaledom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thachuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæchijith|thæchijith]] || [[word:thæchijij|thæchijij]] || [[word:thæchijish|thæchijish]] || [[word:thæchiji|thæchiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachuchujuth|thachuchujuth]] || [[word:thachuchujuj|thachuchujuj]] || [[word:thachuchujush|thachuchujush]] || [[word:thachuchuju|thachuchuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachujuth|thachujuth]] || [[word:thachujuj|thachujuj]] || [[word:thachujush|thachujush]] || [[word:thachuju|thachuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachufjuth|thachufjuth]] || [[word:thachufjuj|thachufjuj]] || [[word:thachufjush|thachufjush]] || [[word:thachufjuf|thachufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thachujuthu|thachujuthu]] || [[word:thachujuju|thachujuju]] || [[word:thachujushu|thachujushu]] || [[word:thachujuku|thachujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thachujuth|thachujuth]] || [[word:thachujuj|thachujuj]] || [[word:thachujush|thachujush]] || [[word:thachuju|thachuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thachujuthul|thachujuthul]] || [[word:thachujujul|thachujujul]] || [[word:thachujushul|thachujushul]] || [[word:thachujukul|thachujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thachujuthuthu|thachujuthuthu]] || [[word:thachujujuju|thachujujuju]] || [[word:thachujushushu|thachujushushu]] || [[word:thachujuku|thachujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thachujuthun|thachujuthun]] || [[word:thachujujun|thachujujun]] || [[word:thachujushun|thachujushun]] || [[word:thachujukun|thachujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thachujuthuoro|thachujuthuoro]] || [[word:thachujujuoro|thachujujuoro]] || [[word:thachujushuoro|thachujushuoro]] || [[word:thachujukuoro|thachujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
